channel.title: Project Hail Mary on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Project Hail Mary on MinWeb

item.title: The Truth Behind Ryan Gosling and Katy Perry’s Viral Hoax
item.description: Discover the truth behind the viral hoax claiming Ryan Gosling consulted Katy Perry for his space film and explore why this clever satire fooled the internet.

item.title: Project Hail Mary Shatters Amazon Opening Weekend Records
item.description: Project Hail Mary is a record-breaking sci-fi hit that delivers smart, original storytelling and stunning visuals; find out why this blockbuster is worth...
